text.title: spatial-ui-patterns Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: productivity app with main window + tools palette.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: VisionOS productivity app. Main editor window body-locked at 1.8 m; tools palette hand-attached.

section.title: Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0; FoV occupancy under 40%; passes visionOS review.
